title: RedisEntityBridge
description: Plugin to send entities to other servers via redis!
body:
"Simple" plugin to send entities to other servers via redis
Config includes options to create portals that send entities to a specific server, so you can even have specific setups like "A>B>C>A"

Requires an existing redis host, and at least two servers to work properly.

Entities being transferred will retain all NBT data, except for Position, UUID and Rotation values, meaning for example any custom mobs or entities carrying chests with items will retain all their data.

**Players, Items and other "Inanimate" entities will not get transferred.**
